---
title: "Stimulating the brain"
toc: false
---

Computational models can predict how external inputs — visual stimuli or
transcranial magnetic stimulation — propagate through brain networks and
generate measurable evoked potentials. This chapter applies the Jansen–Rit
model to reproduce and interpret such responses.

## Session

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-8}
### [Stimulation](05_stimulation.qmd)
Configure the Jansen–Rit model to receive external drive. Simulate visual- and
TMS-evoked potentials, compare them to empirical waveforms, and explore how
stimulation parameters shape the network response.
:::

:::

---

*See the [workshop agenda](../agenda/agenda.qmd).*
